projects.title: Contact Book CLI
projects.description: Create a command-line interface application to manage professional and personal contacts using Swift structs and arrays.

projects.title: Weather Forecast App
projects.description: Build the data layer for a weather app, using codable protocols to parse JSON and optional chaining to handle unpredictable API data.

projects.title: Habit Tracker Model
projects.description: Design a reusable habit tracking engine using protocols and extensions, allowing users to define custom goals and track streaks.
